text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I could go into town and people<n>watch—I mean,
take a stroll... Or maybe<n>I could search for a
four-leaf clover?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's so fun thinking about what to<n>do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've decided! I'll do both! First<n>I'll find a
four-leaf clover, then I'll go<n>into town! ♪
